# Technicians

Manage your field technician roster, including their skills, availability, and service areas.

## Technician List

View all technicians with their current status, assigned jobs, and utilization rates.

## Technician Profiles

Each technician profile includes:
- **Skills** — Certifications and service capabilities
- **Service Areas** — Geographic zones they cover
- **Availability** — Working hours and time off
- **Equipment** — Tools and vehicles assigned
- **Performance** — Completion rates and customer ratings

## Adding Technicians

Add technicians manually or sync from your connected FSM platform. Each technician needs at minimum a name, at least one skill, and an availability schedule.
